content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (iter-015)

## Closest-to-completion / priority
1. **S3 skyscraper-cokernel iso** `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` (OcOfD L1086) ‚Äî THE next
   critical leaf. Now unblocked: the codim-1 DVR-stalk lemmas it can reference are all available
   (`isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_smooth`, the global regularity instance). Per plan iter-014 +
   progress-critic: this carries a STUCK sub-signal (3 prior attempts, sorry 0‚Üí2‚Üí4). **DO NOT send a
   blind 4th whole-iso `prove`.** Lead with an **effort-breaker** dispatch to split into the already-
   blueprinted G1/G2/G3 sub-blocks (chapter L1623), THEN prove the smallest piece. The decomposition is
   blueprint-ready (blueprint-reviewer iter-014 confirmed ‚Äî no blueprint-writer needed first).

2. **`sheafOf_ses_single_add` corner cases** (OcOfD L1159) ‚Äî main case CLOSED this iter; the 2 corner
   sorries (`D=0`, `[P]+D=0`) need a `carrierSheaf 0 ‚âÖ toModuleKSheaf C` bridge (regular functions =
   order-‚â•0 on integral scheme, Hartshorne II ¬ß6 pre-Prop 6.11). Queue WITH the S3 cokernel work (same
   file, same iter). Not yet blueprinted as its own lemma ‚Äî consider a blueprint-writer block for the bridge.

## Stale `.lean` comment cleanup (lean-auditor/iter014 ‚Äî 5 major, all non-code)
Review cannot edit `.lean`. Hand a prover/refactor a comment-only cleanup pass on OcOfD.lean (no proof
change) for these now-FALSE comments contradicting iter-014's closed work:
- Module docstring ~L68: "each of four decls is Tier-3 sorry" ‚Äî `sheafOf`+`sheafOf_zero` now closed.
- `sheafOf` docstring ~L606-633: "general case still a sorry" / "iter-183 Lane K Tier-3 honest typed sorry" ‚Äî stale.
- Body comment ~L661-667: "residual sorry is cotangent fact; no Mathlib bridge" ‚Äî both false (closed iter-011/014).
- `sheafOf_ses_single_add` comment ~L1192: "gated on L635 finrank fact" ‚Äî gate lifted iter-014.
Low-priority but accumulating; fold into the iter-015 OcOfD prover's preamble if it touches the file.

## Blocked ‚Äî do NOT re-assign as-is
- `sheafOf_singlePoint_iso` (L745): off-cone, blocked on an OCofP-`private` declaration. Needs a structural
  change (expose the OCofP helper) before it is provable ‚Äî not a `prove` target.

## Reusable patterns discovered
- **Substrate-wiring as a global instance**: lifting a codim-1 regularity witness to a top-level
  `instance` (rather than an inline `haveI ... ‚ü®‚Ä¶‚ü©`) makes downstream `haveI := inferInstance` and is
  reusable by any smooth-curve consumer. Pattern: `‚ü®fun Y => <stalk-lemma> Y.point Y.coheight‚ü©`.
- **Namespace placement matters for blueprint pins**: place a decl in the namespace its blueprint `\lean{}`
  pin names (here `AlgebraicGeometry`, NOT the enclosing `Scheme.WeilDivisor` section) or sync_leanok/dag
  resolution breaks. The prover caught and corrected this mid-session.
- **Import-direction check before adding an import**: CurveKrullDim‚ÜíOcOfD was safe because CurveKrullDim
  imports only SmoothStalkDVR+CoheightBridge (neither imports OcOfD/WeilDivisor) ‚Äî verify the back-edge is absent.

## Markers / coverage
- 2 stale blueprint `% NOTE` markers FIXED this pass (see summary). No outstanding marker debt.
- `unmatched` = 138, all out-of-cone substrate; both new decls covered. No RR-cone 1-to-1 debt to blueprint.
